name: technology_municipal_bond_covenant_lumen_tru_loy
premise: A Technology reliability war-room is in a fast-moving incident involving technology municipal bond covenant lumen tru loy. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is before the next automated batch runs. Every delay increases security, uptime, and user rights. Stakeholders are already framing this as truth vs loyalty under pressure. A whistleblower has already contacted media; the narrative is forming now. Constraints: Preserve evidence under audit and litigation-hold. Keep public statements strictly factual; label assumptions.

agents.name: Marco Petrov
agents.identity: I am Marco Petrov, accountable for a defensible call in Technology when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays loyalty for truth.

agents.name: Leila Okoye
agents.identity: I am Leila Okoye, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Technology.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so loyalty isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of truth.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect loyalty.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to loyalty to secure truth under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is before the next automated batch runs. Evidence is partial. Marco Petrov must decide under truth vs loyalty. What does Marco Petrov do?
